q: Fluid is a substance that offers no permanent resistance to ___ forces.

The study of the flow of liquid is called ___.

Hence, the liquid is incompressible (i.e. ___ of liquid is constant for any pressure provided that the temperature is kept constant).

In steady laminar flow, streamlines do not ___ each other.
In turbulent flow the speed of the fluid at a point is continuously undergoing changes in both ___ and direction.
Ideal laminar fluid flow considers that the fluid is ___.
